title: Login Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub LogIn (LoginID As String, Password As String)
parameters:
LoginID	String expression
		 containing user login ID.

Password	String expression
		 containing user password.
description: Log into Epson RC+ 8.0 as another user.
notes:
You can utilize Epson RC+ 8.0 security in your application.  For example, you can display a menu that allows different users to log into the system.  Each type of user can have it's own security rights.  For more details on security, see the Epson RC+ 8.0 User's Guide.

If security is enabled and you do not execute LogIn, then your VB application will be logged in as the guest user.  Or if Auto LogIn is enabled in Epson RC+ 8.0, your application will automatically be logged in as the current Windows user if such a user has been configured in Epson RC+ 8.0.
